creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Nov 15, 2010 at 10:04,  <dinoex@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: print/cups-base: SSL support missing
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
> State-Changed-By: dinoex
> State-Changed-When: Mon Nov 15 10:04:12 CET 2010
> State-Changed-Why:
> License information has been updated.

That's great but this PR wasn't about it.
Please reopen and change GNUTLS to be disabled by default.

Actually there should be something like:

.if defined(WITH_GNUTLS)
IGNORE= GnuTLS does not work, see ports/150310
.else
WARNING= SSL with threads may misbehave, see http://www.cups.org/str.php?L3605
.warning ${WARNING}
#XXX echo "echo ${WARNING}" >> pkg-message
.endif

>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=150310
>
